_comment: Harvest campaign starter prompts. Loaded into the prompts table via `bbg-admin import` (idempotent UpsertPrompt). The /harvest page serves a deck of 20 under-supplied prompts from this pool. Each prompt is a question that elicits a short, opinionated, lived-in answer — the kind a human writes naturally but an LLM struggles to mimic. The collection here mixes the prototype's seed prompts with new ones in the same voice.

prompts.text: What's the worst piece of advice you've ever been given?
Describe your morning routine in one sentence.
What would you do with one extra hour every day?
A small thing that makes you irrationally angry?
Pitch me a terrible business idea.
What's your hot take on pizza?
Tell me about a weird dream you had.
What's your most useless talent?
Finish: the worst part of adulthood is...
A conspiracy theory you kind of believe?
Describe your perfect Sunday.
Something everyone loves that you secretly hate?
What food would you never eat again?
Best lie you've told a child?
Worst trip you've ever taken?
A skill you have that almost never comes up?
An opinion you've changed in the last 5 years?
What's a small ritual that gets you through the day?
The most embarrassing music in your library?
What's your go-to comfort food when nobody's watching?
A movie you pretend to like more than you actually do?
Something you do that you're convinced no one else does?
What's the dumbest thing you've spent real money on?
A childhood belief that took you embarrassingly long to drop?
What's your most controversial opinion about coffee?
Describe your relationship with houseplants.
What show do you put on when you can't decide what to watch?
The most overrated 'life hack' you've encountered?
A piece of clothing you wear way more than you should?
What's the weirdest food combination you genuinely enjoy?
Something you absolutely cannot do without sounding like an idiot?
A 'rule' you follow that has zero basis in reality?
What's the most useless thing you remember from school?
Describe your shower thinking pattern.
The household chore you'll do anything to avoid?
What's a small luxury you can no longer live without?
Something that always makes you laugh, even on a bad day?
